workers.title: AI_OS MAIN CONTROL
workers.endMarker: 🧭🌙 AI_OS MAIN CONTROL :: END OF CHAT
workers.role: Primary operator terminal for runtime spine commands and final coordination.
allowedActions: Check repo status and review validator output
Paste approved git commands with explicit file paths
blockedActions: No live trading, broker, OANDA, API key, or secret actions
No startup tasks or scheduled tasks

workers.title: CODEX BUILD LANE
workers.role: Focused build window for approved repo-scoped implementation work.
allowedActions: Report files created, changed, validation, git status, commit, and push state
blockedActions: No protected root governance edits unless explicitly approved
No dashboard or Trading Lab changes unless scoped

workers.title: VALIDATOR WORKER
workers.role: Validation-only window for checks, parser tests, and read-only verification.
allowedActions: Parse changed JSON or PowerShell files
Report PASS, WARN, or FAIL plainly
blockedActions: No live trading or broker paths

workers.title: PACKET QUEUE
workers.role: Queue review window for workload packets, command packs, and next safe tasks.
allowedActions: Sort next work by runtime-spine value
blockedActions: No random dashboard or tool expansion
No broker or trading execution actions

workers.title: APPROVAL INBOX
workers.role: Decision window for approvals, stop conditions, and user-controlled checkpoints.
allowedActions: Approve or reject exact APPLY scopes
Confirm explicit git add, commit, push, or PR steps
blockedActions: No merge, delete, move, rename, reset, clean, or auth changes without direct approval

workers.title: RECOVERY HEALTH
workers.role: Recovery and health-check window for failures, mismatches, and blocked states.
allowedActions: Mark UNKNOWN, MISMATCH, or INVALID DATA when evidence requires it
blockedActions: No credential or security setting changes
No startup or scheduled task changes

workers.title: STANDBY WORKER
workers.role: Idle worker window reserved for approved next tasks only.
allowedActions: Run read-only status checks when asked
blockedActions: No staging, commits, pushes, or external launches
No broker or trading execution actions
